title: Elegant architecture
description: This is an add-on pack for the mod "Elegant Countryside". Its content consists of building blocks that are an expansion of "Elegant Countryside". Of course, it's as elegant as "Elegant Countryside".
body:
## This is the first add-on for Elegant Countryside. Thanks for your support!
This is an add-on for the mod "Elegant Countryside". It provides numerous building blocks. Just like "Elegant Countryside", it is still being updated continuously!

![logi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/21f549495a6708e90c05a6ca9d0c451e17162d50_0.webp)

This mod adds the building blocks and roof blocks that are missing in Elegant Countryside (which is currently in progress). It is expected to add more than 800 blocks, and the completion speed may be even earlier than that of Elegant Countryside. Stay tuned!

Currently, more than 400+ blocks and structures have been updated. Once completed, it will be open to the workspace. If you have the intention to create affiliated content, please send a private message to the Witch.

![VQb8lYeg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e954b69e9d29d5176de3c4a8593d8ea80f9a5b97.jpeg)
